transcript: Speaker A (AI): तुम्हाला इंग्रजी कळतं पण बोलायला जमत नाही? [Do you understand English but struggle to speak it?] तुझं नाव काय आहे? [What is your name?] Speaker B (Human): My name is Neha. Speaker A (AI): तुझं वय काय आहे? [What is your age?] Speaker B (Human): I have 22. Speaker A (AI): I have 22 नाही, I am 22 years old म्हणतात. [Not I have 22, they say I am 22 years old.] Speaker B (Human): Okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker A (AI): तू कुठली आहेस? [Where are you from?] Speaker B (Human): I am Maharashtra. Speaker A (AI): I am from Maharashtra होईल. [It should be I am from Maharashtra.] Speaker B (Human): My English is not good and I have no one to practice with. Speaker A (AI): I am Sivi, your AI English Tutor. I will give you instant feedback on pronunciation and grammar. It is 7 times cheaper than normal classes and takes only 15-20 minutes a day. Speaker B (Human): How do I join? Speaker A (AI): Click install, download MySivi, and start practicing to see improvement in 15 days.
on_screen_text: तुम्हाला इंग्रजी कळतं पण बोलायला जमत नाही? [Do you understand English but struggle to speak?] I am 22 yrs old. I am from Maharashtra. MySivi AI English Tutor. ७ पट स्वस्त [7 times cheaper]. १ कोटी+ डाऊनलोड्स [1 Crore+ Downloads]. रोज १५-२० मिनिटे [15-20 minutes daily]. १५ दिवसात इंप्रूव्हमेंट [Improvement in 15 days].
summary: A split-screen ad where an AI tutor corrects a Marathi speaker's English grammar. It promotes the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice tool to improve English speaking skills in 15 days.
